pageContext.name: Huang Zhong (Colored Edition)
pageContext.description: The 1/7 scale Huang Zhong Statue is based on the Battle of Mount Dingjun. It has captured the charm of Huang Zhong, who cleaved Xiahou Yuan beneath the shoulders.  The allusion is a classic symbol of national characteristics. And it is also reenacted in Peking Opera, as well as a film titled Mount Dingjun which is the first Chinese film ever made.  With a view to improving and differentiating designs, the 1/7 scale version was crafted to capture the charm of 'old but vigorous' while intentionally emphasizing the blade-wielding design.
